name: @chbrain/khai-engine-restorative-environment
description: khai restorative-environment engine — the setting that refills depleted directed attention rather than draining it
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: The setting that refills depleted directed attention rather than draining it.

card.wire: Link the persona's current restorative quality (being-away, fascination, or extent) to the expression under Projection.
card.issue: What refills the persona's depleted directed attention here, and what it does not yet grant.
card.require: Directed attention that is genuinely depleted; a setting whose pull is soft, not gripping.
card.enforce: Do not model the depletion of directed attention itself here; that belongs to the attention engine. Do not model the felt calm or relief; that belongs to the emotion and mood engines. This engine models the place, not the deficit or the feeling.
card.setup: Name which restorative quality (being-away, fascination, or extent) is in play, what routine or demand the persona is apart from, and what the place still withholds.
